name: Take Home Salary Calculator
description: Estimate your take-home pay after tax and deductions.
formulaDescription: Calculates estimated monthly or annual take-home pay after tax and other deductions.

example.explanation: After 20% tax and ₹20,000 deductions, take-home pay is ₹9,40,000.

faqs.question: Is this exact?
faqs.answer: This is an estimate; actual take-home depends on tax slabs, exemptions, and employer deductions.
